prompt: A candy castle great hall with walls made of chocolate bricks topped with white icing snow. Giant lollipop pillars in red-white and blue-white spiral patterns support candy cane arches. The floor is checkered pink-and-white candy tiles. Colorful gumdrop decorations line the base of the walls. A gingerbread throne with white icing details sits at the far end of the hall. To the right, a licorice-framed doorway opens into a side chamber filled with a chocolate fountain cascading into a wafer-cone basin. To the left, a stained-sugar window casts rainbow light across a display of candy jars on marshmallow shelves. Behind the viewer, a grand candy-cane staircase spirals upward past a banner of jelly beans strung on cotton-candy thread. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level looking down the candy hall toward the gingerbread throne. No held objects.
